name: galileo14-plugins
description: Galileo14's plugin marketplace — AI-native tools for research, reporting and knowledge work. Built by galileo14.com.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research and intelligence gathering: company dossiers, deep multi-source research, fact-checking and quick panoramic searches. Fans out platform-specific researcher agents in parallel and grades the result before delivery. Output adapts to the user's language.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Meta-tooling for working with Claude: prompt engineering (CAR, COSTAR & RISEN frameworks) and deterministic skill scaffolding. Output adapts to the user's language.
